text.title: Segment-Aware Design System Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Component count doubles per segment; updates miss one fork.
antipattern.root-cause: Team copied `Button.tsx` to `ButtonEnterprise.tsx` instead of using a variant.
antipattern.fix: Replace forks with a single component + segment prop; delete duplicates.

antipattern.symptom: Stories render differently in Storybook than in prod; QA confused.
antipattern.root-cause: Component inferred segment from auth context; Storybook had no auth.
antipattern.fix: Make segment an explicit prop; default to 'default'.

antipattern.symptom: Content team edits TSX files; mistakes ship to prod.
antipattern.root-cause: Strings hardcoded in components instead of i18n.
antipattern.fix: Move strings to i18n bundles keyed by (locale, segment).
